body:
## 🟢 Good First Issue: Add Grammar Point #63 — Beginner-Friendly Open Source Contribution

![Time: <1 minute](https://img.shields.io/badge/Time-<1_minute-brightgreen) ![Difficulty: Beginner](https://img.shields.io/badge/Difficulty-Beginner-blue) ![No Code Required](https://img.shields.io/badge/No_Code-Required-orange)

> 🟢 **No prerequisites needed!** You don't need to clone the repo, install anything, or write code.
> This entire contribution can be done from your browser in under 60 seconds.

**Labels:** good first issue, help wanted, hacktoberfest  
**Language:** JSON (no coding required)  
**Time:** < 1 minute  
**Skill Level:** Absolute beginner  

---
## 📖 Add New Grammar Point

**Category:** Community Contribution - Grammar  
**Difficulty:** Easy (good first issue!)  
**Estimated Time:** <1 min

---

### 🎯 Your Task

Add this grammar explanation to our learner-friendly grammar list!

### The Grammar Point

> "〜に比べて" means "compared to...".

### 📝 Instructions

1. Star our repo ⭐
2. Fork our repo 🍴
3. Open [`community/content/japanese-grammar.json`](../blob/main/community/content/japanese-grammar.json) in your browser (click the link!)
4. Scroll to the bottom of the file and paste the following grammar string just before the closing `]`:

```json
""〜に比べて" means "compared to..."."
```

5. Add a comma after the previous last entry in the array (so the JSON stays valid)
6. Save the file and commit the changes
7. Submit a Pull Request with title: `content: add new grammar point`
8. Link this issue using `Closes #<issue_number>`
9. Wait for review!

---

### 🚀 Quick Info

| | |
|---|---|
| **Difficulty** | Beginner / Easy |
| **Time** | < 1 minute |
| **Language** | TypeScript, JSON |
| **Framework** | Next.js, React |
| **Good for** | First-time contributors, Hacktoberfest |

> **No coding experience required!** This is a simple JSON/data file edit — perfect for your first open source contribution. No setup is required. 

**Questions?** Comment below and we'll help! 🙌

_This is a beginner-friendly, good first issue for first-time open source contributors. No coding experience needed — just edit a JSON file! See our [Beginner Contributing Guide](../blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING-BEGINNERS.md) for step-by-step instructions._
